details.test: Task 1: Buy two different size M T-shirts under 30 and open cart
Task 2: Play latest eligible video and add to Favorites
Task 3: Create Workout Mix playlist with up to 5 tracks
Task 4: Select two second-cheapest LA tickets and go to checkout
Task 5: Buy Midnight Echoes digital edition under 20 with most tracks
Task 6: Subscribe to newsletter with weekly frequency and interests
Task 7: Save three 2024 Tour Diary posts and open from reading list
Task 8: Build vinyl plus hoodie bundle under 100
